questions.text: The arithmetic mean of 5, 10, 15, and 20 is:
The mode of a data set is the value that appears most frequently.
questions.explanation: The mode is the value that occurs most often in a data set. A data set can have one mode, multiple modes, or no mode.

questions.text: What is the range of the data: 3, 7, 12, 18, 25?
The middle value in an ordered data set is called the ________.
questions.explanation: The median is the middle value when data is arranged in ascending or descending order. If there's an even number of values, the median is the mean of the two middle values.
